title: Juliupper
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|italics=1|notoc=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Juliupper'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Shuttle/Legends|Shuttle]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Ion engine/Legends|Ion drives]] |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull=[[Titanium-alloy]] |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], [[Julevian system]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', which include the ''Juliupper''{{'s}} [[Destruction of Sernpidal|destruction]] in the [[Julevian system]], to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. |retired= |battles=[[Destruction of Sernpidal]] |affiliation= |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers=A [[Unidentified pilot (Juliupper)|pilot]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Is that what got the ''Juliupper''?''"
"''Bug things.|An individual and the ''Millennium Falcon''{{'s}} [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], on the ''Juliupper''{{'s}} destruction|}} The '''''Juliupper''''' was a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] equipped with [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]] and a [[titanium-alloy]] [[Hull/Legends|hull]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], it was one of several [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that attempted to evacuate the residents of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Julevian system]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]], which was located in the [[Julevian system]], while the planet was [[Destruction of Sernpidal|destroyed]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] by [[Yo'gand's Core|pulling]] Sernpidal's [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Dobido]] into the planet. Several Yuuzhan Vong [[grutchin]]s, [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] creatures that tore through starships, attacked the ''Juliupper'' over Sernpidal, boring through the vessel's hull and attacking its ion [[Engine/Legends|engines]]. After the shuttle's [[Unidentified pilot (Juliupper)|pilot]] called for assistance, the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]''[[Millennium Falcon Owner's Workshop Manual]]'' [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] moved to assist, [[Death/Legends|killing]] one of the attacking grutchins with its [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]; however, the creatures destroyed the ''Juliupper''. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Juliupper'' first appeared in the [[1999]] novel [[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime|''Vector Prime'']], written by [[R. A. Salvatore]] as the first volume in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' novel series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Juliupper |es=Juliupper |pl=Juliupper }} [[Category:Shuttles]]
